## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat:` new feature (minor version bump)
- [ ] `fix:` bug fix (patch bump)
- [ ] `docs:` documentation only (patch bump)
- [ ] `test:` test additions / changes (patch bump)
- [ ] `refactor:` no behavioural change (patch bump)
- [ ] `perf:` performance improvement (patch bump)
- [ ] `chore:` build / tooling
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE:` major bump (describe migration in the body)

## Testing

- [ ] `dotnet test StarsTracker.Tests/StarsTracker.Tests.csproj` is green locally.
- [ ] Built and deployed to a physical Android device (state which model).
- [ ] Verified the affected feature manually (camera, overlay, calibration,
      recording — whichever applies).
- [ ] No new permissions introduced, OR new permissions justified below.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is in **English only** (toponyms in `LandmarkService` are the
      only Polish allowed).
- [ ] Public functions have XML doc comments (`<summary>`, `<param>`,
      `<returns>` where relevant).
- [ ] SOLID principles respected — no functions over ~30 lines.
- [ ] Atomic commits with **Conventional Commits** messages.
- [ ] Author is `Jakub Syrek <jakubvonsyrek@gmail.com>`, no AI co-authors.
